name: KrillApp.DataPoint.Graph
title: Data Graph
description: Displays historical data from a source DataPoint as a visual graph over a configured time range (hour, day, week, month, or year). Automatically links to the parent DataPoint as its source if none is specified. Read-only visualization node with no side effects.
shortDescription: Visualizes historical DataPoint values as a graph over a configurable time range.
llmPurpose: Visualizes historical time-series data from a source DataPoint as a graph over a configurable time range.
llmBehavior: reads historical data from source DataPoint
auto-links to parent DataPoint if no source specified
llmPromptHints: show a graph of this data
llmCreationHints: Create a Graph node as a child of a DataPoint to visualize its historical data. Optionally configure a different source DataPoint and time range.

llmConnectionHints.role: leaf display node that reads from a source DataPoint

llmExamples: Show a graph of this temperature sensor over the last day.
Add a chart for this data point.
Visualize the pressure readings for the past week.
